advancements.foxglove.inscribe.descripti: Etch a spell into a piece of Charmed Bark.
advancements.foxglove.inscribe.title: Lovebirds
advancements.foxglove.obtain_bark.descri: Use some rare practices to get some unique tree bark.
advancements.foxglove.obtain_bark.title: Just a Bit off the Top...
spell_component.foxglove.agile.desc: The opposite of Weighted, the target's speed will increase the lower their armor protection value is.
spell_component.foxglove.blighted.desc: The target will experience the same effects as a zombie, taking damage when standing in the sun.
spell_component.foxglove.cloak.desc: If the target of the spell is not near an entity, they will be invisible.
spell_component.foxglove.dizzy.desc: All item names will be scrambled for the duration of the spell.
spell_component.foxglove.handy.desc: For the duration of the spell, the cooldowns between usages of items will be decreased.
spell_component.foxglove.lazy_eyes.desc: The target's crosshair will be offset ever so slightly.
spell_component.foxglove.lockjaw.desc: The target will be prevented from opening their mouth (speaking or eating) for the duration of the spell.
spell_component.foxglove.rabbitfoot.desc: The target's speed will increase by one unit for each time they jump.
spell_component.foxglove.transparent.des: The target will become slightly transparent for the duration of the spell.
spell_component.foxglove.weighted.desc: The target's speed will be decreased, this modifier will increase based on the armor protection value.
